entries.name: platform-user-offboarding-sla-check
entries.purpose: Hourly: scan platform_users rows with status='offboarded' AND deleted_at + `platform-user.offboarding.sla_hours` < now() where the RevokePlatformUserAccessJob metric has NOT emitted successfully. Any hit pages PagerDuty via the on-call transport + writes a critical audit row. Zero hits is the healthy state.

entries.name: platform-user-retention-purge
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC: dispatch PurgeOffboardedPlatformUsersJob to hard-delete PlatformUser rows past the 90-day retention hold. Weekly cadence is enough because the retention window is long — a delay of up to 7 days beyond the 90th day is compliance-safe.

entries.name: platform-user-onboarding-reminders
entries.purpose: Daily 10:00 UTC: scan platform_users rows with status='pending' AND days-since-hire matches `platform-user.onboarding.checklist_reminder_days`. Dispatch reminder notifications to the pending staffer + their manager. Escalate to super_admin when days-since-hire >= `platform-user.onboarding.escalate_after_days`.

entries.name: platform-user-mfa-coverage-probe
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes: compute the ratio of active PlatformUsers with mfa_secret_encrypted NOT NULL on their Identity. Emit the `stackra.platform_user.mfa.coverage_ratio` gauge. Ratio < 1.0 alerts security within one polling interval.

entries.name: platform-user-active-headcount-metric
entries.purpose: Hourly: emit `stackra.platform_user.active.count` gauge per department. Cheap query; feeds the ops dashboard.

entries.name: platform-user-on-call-warmup
entries.purpose: Every minute (when platform-user.on_call.enabled=true): resolve current + next shift via OnCallResolver, refreshing the 60s cache pro-actively so the on-call escalation critical path never pays the resolver round-trip. Skipped when the resolver is disabled.

entries.name: platform-user-manager-integrity-scan
entries.purpose: Daily 06:00 UTC: run the ManagerIntegrityProbe as a scheduled task (in addition to the readiness probe endpoint). Any hit writes an audit row + emits an alert. Guards against a slow drift where an admin offboards a manager without reassigning their reports first.
